title: alchemilla arvensis var. pusilla
intro: Alchemilla arvensis var. pusilla, also known as small alpine lady's mantle, is a small, perennial plant belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin issues such as eczema and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include soothing irritated skin, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable natural remedy for skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Alchemilla arvensis var. pusilla include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
